process: finishing-a-development-branch: Verify tests -> Detect environment -> Present options -> Execute choice -> Clean up

tests_verified_first.gate: do not present options until tests pass (they do)

environment: named feature branch in a normal repo (not detached HEAD)
options_presented: 2. Push and create a Pull Request
chosen: 2. Push and create a Pull Request
worktree: preserved (Options 2 and 3 never clean up - needed for PR iteration)

pr.title: fix(payments): eliminate duplicate-charge race in idempotency layer (PAY-4815)

summary: Root cause: check-then-act TOCTOU race - lookup()+reserve() were not atomic and lacked per-key mutual exclusion, so concurrent same-key requests both MISSed and both charged.
Fix: atomic reserve-or-get (INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING RETURNING); only the winner charges, losers return the original charge.
Defense-in-depth: L1 header validation, L2 atomic claim, L3 UNIQUE(idempotency_key), L4 per-key boundary log.
Review fixes: assert non-owner returns original charge id; bounded-deadline wait so a crashed owner can't hang the retry.
test_plan: [x] tests/load/test_idempotency_race.py: 50 concurrent same-key -> exactly 1 PSP charge; all responses share one charge id
[x] crashed-owner path: bounded wait, stale in_progress reclaimable

next: writing_skills (distill the reusable lesson now that the work is shipping)
source: finishing-a-development-branch (verify tests -> 4-option menu -> push+PR with Summary/Test Plan)
